panels.title: 🎸 Instruments
panels.infobox:
Instruments increase your summon limit and mana capacity. Each instrument supersedes the last.

⚠️ = MISSABLE — tied to specific choice or event window
panels.content: **Warning:** Getting Gnimb's Flute (SA1) before Stromness permanently prevents obtaining Upgraded Brute.

items.name: Ornate Lute
items.location: Obtained by defeating Fnarf in Highland Park (Ch. IV)

items.name: Jeweled Flute
items.location: Obtained from Valkyrie after helping Hrafn in Burial Chamber (Ch. VI)

items.name: Silver Harp
items.location: Chest in Old City Tunnels (SA7), Dounby

items.name: Finn's Lute
items.location: From female refugee in the cell in SW of Finstown (Ch. IX)

items.name: Ancient Flute
items.location: Buy from Crazy Thorvald (Stromness) — comes with free Upgraded Brute song

items.name: Harp of Ages
items.location: Be nice to the Chosen in Obligatory Lava Level (SA8)

items.name: Ossian's Lute
items.location: Chest on Level 1, Island Tower (Ch. XIII)

items.name: Gnimb's Flute
items.location: Secret room chest, Ruins of Dun Alfiene (SA1) — requires Upgraded Trap Finder. WARNING: Getting this before Stromness prevents obtaining Upgraded Brute
